content: Planning pass re-entry (planning-2) consumed ~561 minutes wall-clock, far exceeding any other phase. The gap between gap-cycle-1 completion (07:35) and test-planner completion (17:04) suggests the test-planner re-entry was the primary stall point within planning-2, likely due to generating 5 new test scenarios with full context directories.
sourceEvidence: roster-planner iter 2 at 07:46, routing-planner iter 2 at 08:15, but test-planner iter 2 at 17:04 — a 9-hour gap between routing completion and test completion.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
